creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!
When working on this, I still get warnings from poudriere about the shebang line, both when building without python support. I'm not sure how to fix that, which is why this takes such time.

===========================================================================
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: '/usr/bin/python' is an invalid shebang you need USES=shebangfix for 'share/examples/rrdtool/stripes.py'
*** Error code 1

Stop.
